calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Sctcm, Llcs Application For Default Judgment By Court Against Defendant Thomas Lyles And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Thomas Lyles.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

William W. Bunting. appeared for plaintiff SCTCM, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Thomas Lyles.
Default was entered against defendant on November 17, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 24, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 4, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff SCTCM, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Thomas Lyles, as follows:

Damages - $97,700.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $60,105.54.
Attorney Fees - $6,750.00.
Costs - $640.00.

Total - $165,195.54.

Proposed judment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff Sctcm, Llcs Application For Default Judgment By Court Against Defendant Thomas Lyles And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Continued To Apr-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2018 Continued To Apr-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
